Ruturaj Gaikwad Deserves Longer Run, Says R Ashwin

Dec 6, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Ruturaj Gaikwad Deserves Longer Run, Says R Ashwin

Ruturaj Gaikwad has proven his mettle in the India vs South Africa ODIs, earning high praise from former India star Ravichandran Ashwin. After scoring a scintillating 105 off 83 balls in the second ODI at Raipur, Gaikwad showcased his class, shot selection, and exceptional running between the wickets.

Ashwin emphasised that Gaikwad deserves a longer run in the ODI side, even when Shreyas Iyer returns from injury, noting that such consistent opportunities will help unlock Gaikwad’s full potential.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here: 👉 Ruturaj Gaikwad Deserves Longer Run, Says R Ashwin
